description_long: This object is a modern mobile phone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front face is dominated by a large, black screen surrounded by a bold red bezel, giving it a striking appearance. The device appears to have a front-facing camera and a speaker slot at the top of the screen, with a small circular sensor or button visible on the upper right. The sides of the phone are black, with visible ports and buttons, including a USB charging port and what appears to be a SIM card slot. The back and edges are not fully visible, but the overall design suggests a contemporary smartphone with a robust build. The materials appear to be primarily glass for the screen and plastic or metal for the frame, with a compact and lightweight construction.
description: A modern mobile phone with a large black screen, red bezel, and black sides, featuring visible ports and a front-facing camera.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black screen bordered by a red bezel, with the USB port and a small hole visible at the bottom edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, red bezel, and a visible SIM card slot or button on the right edge.
description_view_2: Top view displaying the speaker slot, front-facing camera, and a small circular sensor or button on the upper right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the red bezel, black side, and additional ports or buttons on the left edge.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank and turned off, with no visible content, icons, or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: A single front-facing camera is located at the top of the screen, slightly to the right, next to a speaker slot and a small circular sensor or button.
attribute_button_layout: One or more physical buttons are visible on the right and left edges, likely for power and volume control, with a possible SIM card slot on the right.
